---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a defensive or educational improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Defensive Use Case

How would this help developers, students, or security researchers perform authorized analysis or improve secure development?

## Proposed Behavior

What should LoginGuard display, detect, or document?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any simpler or safer alternatives.

## Safety and Ethics

- [ ] This feature is for authorized testing, defensive analysis, secure development, or education.
- [ ] This feature does not require offensive payloads.
- [ ] This feature does not automate form submission, brute force, credential collection, or unauthorized testing.
- [ ] This feature can be implemented with clear privacy boundaries.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or links to safe documentation if useful.
